torch_pattern:
x = input_tensor.reshape({BATCH}, {H_IN}, {W_IN}, -1)[:, :, :, :{C_IN}].permute(0, 3, 1, 2)
x = torch.nn.functional.pad(x.float(), ({PAD_LEFT}, {PAD_RIGHT}, {PAD_TOP}, {PAD_BOTTOM}), mode='constant', value=0)
x = torch.nn.functional.conv2d(x, weight_tensor.float(), bias=bias_tensor.reshape(-1).float(), stride={STRIDE}, padding=(0, 0), dilation={DILATION}, groups={GROUPS})
x = {ACTIVATION}(x)  # optional: fused via conv_config.activation (e.g. relu/silu)
x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).reshape(1, 1, {BATCH} * {H_OUT} * {W_OUT}, {C_OUT})
weight_transform: Weight kept in torch OIHW shape ({C_OUT}, {C_IN}/{GROUPS}, {KH}, {KW}) and passed as a host (or to_device) ttnn tensor; ttnn.conv2d internally prepares/reorders it on first call. Bias reshaped from ({C_OUT},) to (1, 1, 1, {C_OUT}). Use return_weights_and_bias=True and write prepared tensors back (self.weight, self.bias = returned) so preparation happens only on the first invocation.
applicability_notes: ttnn_replacement: output, [out_h, out_w], [prepared_w, prepared_b] = ttnn.conv2d(input_tensor=x, weight_tensor=w, bias_tensor=b, in_channels={C_IN}, out_channels={C_OUT}, batch_size={BATCH}, input_height={H_IN}, input_width={W_IN}, kernel_size={KERNEL}, stride={STRIDE}, padding={PADDING}, dilation={DILATION}, groups={GROUPS}, device=device, conv_config=conv_config, compute_config=compute_config, return_output_dim=True, return_weights_and_bias=True); fusion_notes: Activation following the conv (relu, silu, etc.) is fused into the conv via conv_config.activation instead of being emitted as a separate unary op. Asymmetric padding (4-tuple) is handled natively by ttnn.conv2d, replacing an explicit F.pad + conv2d chain in torch. Input/output are in flattened 1,1,NHW,C layout; the NCHW<->NHWC permutes+reshapes at the boundary are absorbed by the op's expected layout.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large spatial activations (VAE/UNet decoder, high H*W)
placement_observations.source: call_site: 'hidden_states = ttnn.to_memory_config(hidden_states, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)' immediately before ttnn.conv2d; 'slice_type=ttnn.Conv2dDRAMSliceWidth' in sliced conv wrapper

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small/medium activations that fit in L1 (ResNet bottleneck, SD transformer proj convs)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: auto via conv_config; checked downstream with hidden_states.memory_config().memory_layout == ttnn.TensorMemoryLayout.BLOCK_SHARDED

placement_observations.program_config: slice_config=ttnn.Conv2dL1FullSliceConfig (no DRAM slicing, full tensor resident in L1)
placement_observations.source: call_sites: ResNet bottleneck convs and SD proj_in/proj_out/conv_in/conv_out all pass slice_config=ttnn.Conv2dL1FullSliceConfig with conv_config(reshard_if_not_optimal=reshard_if_not_optimal)

memory_config.layout: prepared/reordered by op on first call

placement_observations.source: call_sites/tests: 'tt_weight = ttnn.to_device(tt_weight, device)' then prepared weights captured via return_weights_and_bias=True and reused on subsequent calls

placement_observations.size_descriptor: early-layer convs with tall act blocks (wormhole_b0, layer1 modules)

placement_observations.source: call_site: 'enable_activation_reuse=True if height_sharding and self.stride == 1 else False'
